basis: Anchor 30 plan lists Prosper as a BR exile value/treasure Commander anchor.
Public Commander and cEDH sources label Prosper as a Commander/cEDH deck commander.
Rakdos storm/Breach packages should be separated from casual exile-value defaults.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Expected packages exclude banned Dockside/Mana Crypt patterns.
Ad Nauseam/Breach storm is high-power/cEDH opt-in, not default precon-upgrade behavior.

themes.name: exile_value_treasure
themes.notes: Prosper rewards casting from exile with treasure production.

themes.name: impulse_draw_curve
themes.notes: Exile draw must stay cheap enough to cast before it expires.

themes.name: treasure_artifact_payoffs
themes.notes: Treasure generation supports drain, storm, and artifact-sacrifice payoffs.

themes.name: rakdos_breach_storm
themes.notes: Breach and ritual lines are proven high-power signals.

avoid_patterns.reason: Older Prosper lists can contain cards banned in Commander.

examples: expensive impulse cards that cannot be cast before expiry
avoid_patterns.reason: Exile value needs a playable curve and mana conversion.

examples: Ad Nauseam storm in a casual treasure deck
avoid_patterns.reason: Storm packages should follow explicit power-level intent.
